page: Vultr vcg-h100-216c-1914gb-640vram is a Dedicated Metal GPU server designed for highly parallelized workloads. The system features an Intel x86_64 architecture with 216 physical cores and 216 vCPUs, operating at one thread per core. It is equipped with 1884.0 GB of system memory, providing approximately 8.72 GB of RAM per core to support large-scale data processing.

The primary performance driver of this server is its integrated graphics processing hardware, consisting of eight NVIDIA Hopper H100 GPUs that deliver a combined 640 GB of VRAM. For local data storage, the configuration includes 13312 GB of NVMe SSD capacity, which accommodates large datasets locally to minimize latency during training or inference phases. Additionally, the server includes one complimentary public IPv4 address.

Given the high-density hardware profile, this server represents a significant resource commitment, offering qualitative cost efficiency for enterprise-scale operations that require massive parallel processing power without the overhead of multi-node synchronization. The combination of high-capacity system memory, extensive NVMe storage, and eight enterprise GPUs makes this server suitable for large language model training, complex deep learning workloads, high-performance computing, and massive data science jobs.
description: Vultr vcg-h100-216c-1914gb-640vram is a Dedicated Metal GPU server built on the Intel x86_64 architecture. It features 216 physical cores and 216 vCPUs with a single thread per core configuration. The system is equipped with 1884.0 GB of system memory, yielding 8.72 GB of RAM per core. Acceleration is driven by eight NVIDIA Hopper H100 GPUs providing a total of 640 GB of VRAM. For high-speed local storage, the instance bundles 13312 GB of NVMe SSD capacity. This high-density hardware profile is designed for resource-intensive, parallelized enterprise workloads. It is qualitatively cost-efficient for large-scale operations by consolidating massive compute, memory, and storage resources into a single bare-metal environment. This server is suited for large language model training, deep learning, and complex data science simulations.

tagline: An ultra-high-density bare metal platform featuring eight NVIDIA Hopper H100 GPUs, massive system memory, and extensive local NVMe SSD storage.
